final:
module D_latch (
    input wire D,      // Data input
    input wire obf_EN,     // Enable signal
    output reg Q       // Output
);
    always @* begin
        if (obf_EN) begin
            Q = D;     // Capture data when obf_EN is high
        end
        // If obf_EN is low, Q retains its previous value
    end
endmodule
